action.reasoning: Observation: success dropped to 0.452 (from best 0.646) after heavy bias to only 3 hard envs (LockedRoom/Dynamic/MultiRoom), causing catastrophic forgetting (e.g. DistShift 1.0->0.0, KeyCorridorS3R3 0.84->0.34, Unlock 0.96->0.58). Training stable but imbalanced. Analysis: Multi-task PPO+FlatObs+MlpPolicy learned 7/10 envs well at ~100M steps but hard long-horizon tasks need focused data without destroying prior knowledge; ~7min left allows only ~0.5M steps max (~2min learn @~4500fps + eval). Decision: Revert train.py to balanced sampling (all 10 envs), fine-tune current checkpoint with small lr=3e-5 + 500k steps (chunked logging for curves, n_ep=2 periodic/10 final to save time), submit_eval immediately to recover easy envs and track vs best 0.646.
